name: Blood pressure concern
purpose: Organize blood pressure worries and readings for clinician review — not treatment or diagnosis.
not_allowed: Diagnosing hypertension or hypotension as certainty
Interpreting a single reading as safe or dangerous alone

red_flags.label: severe headache or chest pain with high BP worry

required_questions.prompt: What was the reading or what did you hear about your BP?
Any headache, chest pain, dizziness, or vision changes?
Are you on any BP medicines now?

allowed_actions.title: Log BP readings
allowed_actions.instruction: Write date, time, reading, and symptoms — for clinician review.

allowed_actions.title: Questions for clinician
allowed_actions.instruction: Prepare questions about targets, medicines, and follow-up — do not change dose yourself.
